channel.title: Alternun - Regenerative Impact Platform
channel.description: Track, verify, and monetize your environmental and social impact with Alternun. Join the regenerative economy.

item.title: Introducing AIRS: The Impact Rating System
item.description: Discover how AIRS (Alternun Impact Rating System) converts environmental and social actions into quantifiable tokens, enabling verified impact tracking and monetization.
item.author: contact@alternun.io

item.title: Getting Started with Alternun: Your First Impact Token
item.description: A step-by-step guide to creating your Alternun account, connecting data sources, and earning your first AIRS tokens through verified impact.
item.author: contact@alternun.io

item.title: Enterprise ESG: How Companies Are Using Alternun
item.description: Real-world examples of how enterprises use Alternun to monitor supply chain sustainability and meet ESG commitments with audit-ready reporting.
item.author: contact@alternun.io

item.title: The Future of Impact Investing with Blockchain Verification
item.description: Explore how blockchain technology ensures immutable, transparent records of verified environmental and social impact, creating trust in impact investing.
item.author: contact@alternun.io
